steps.title: Match the plural subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank is "many of whom," referring to multiple biomedical scientists. The phrase naming Elba Serrano is only an inserted example and does not change the plural subject.

steps.title: Reject singular verbs
steps.content: Choice B uses singular has studied. Choice C uses singular studies. Choice D uses singular is studying. The verb must agree with the plural subject. The answer is A.
